title: Find My Device - Playing Tone - app in the background
scenario: Find My Device tone stops when app is moved to background and does not resume upon reopening
steps: Open the Find My Device app and start playing the tone.
Move the app to the background (e.g., switch to another app or go to home screen).
Observe whether the tone continues or stops.
Reopen the Find My Device app.
Check the state of the Play button and whether the tone is heard.
expected: The tone should continue playing when the app is moved to the background, and when reopened, the tone should still be playing or the Play button should reflect the ongoing state.
